feed.title: WPA Journal of Protocol & Diplomacy
feed.subtitle: Protocol, diplomacy, public communication, security studies and communicology.

entry.title: WPA Journal — Inaugural Issue (Vol. 1, No. 1) — Forthcoming
entry.summary: Inaugural issue — forthcoming. Planned publication: September 2026. ISSN/DOI pending official assignment.

entry.title: WPA Journal — Charter and Author Information
entry.summary: Journal identity, aims and scope, author guidelines, submission and editorial policy.
